mechanism_narrative: A halt or reversal in the upward trend of FEDFUNDS after a tightening cycle signals a dovish policy pivot that lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS held at 2.4% since Dec 2018 after Fed signaled pause in early 2019
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS trend flattening and 20d forward SPX returns remains below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive-return frequency after pause signals does not exceed unconditional base rate of 65.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage points over a rolling 3-month window signals an inflection in labor market health that historically precedes economic slowdowns, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 4.0% in Jan 2019, near cycle lows
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns following UNRATE trigger events are positive in more than 55% of historical instances, or Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS growth remains positive while HOUST simultaneously contracts, the divergence between resilient consumer spending and weakening housing investment signals late-cycle demand imbalance, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as housing leads broader demand deceleration.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST revised down from 1256k to 1181k units in late 2018 vintage
failure_condition: Joint RSAFS-up/HOUST-down states do not produce lower mean 20d forward returns than unconditional sample mean at p<0.10, or interaction term adds no incremental Rank IC over single-series HOUST model.

mechanism_narrative: During a late-cycle tightening regime, a combination of elevated FEDFUNDS levels and persistently rising CPIAUCSL signals margin compression risk from higher input and financing costs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 2.4% and CPIAUCSL near 252.6 index level in Jan 2019 after multi-year hiking cycle
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns during joint high-rate/high-inflation states are not significantly below unconditional mean (t-test p > 0.05), or hypothesis fails once FEDFUNDS begins declining despite persistent CPI level.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained positive month-over-month trend in INDPRO reflects expanding industrial output and corporate production capacity utilization, which is associated with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as earnings expectations firm.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value 109.44 as of Jan 2019 release
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO 3-month trend and 5d forward SPX returns stays below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window, or positive INDPRO trend periods show no elevated positive-return frequency versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS monthly job growth decelerates below its 6-month trailing average at the same time UNRATE ticks upward, the joint signal indicates a genuine labor market turning point rather than noise, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 150,574k (vintage) vs 150,060k revised in Jan 2019 release, showing revision volatility
failure_condition: Joint deceleration-plus-UNRATE-uptick states fail to produce negative mean 20d forward returns significantly different from zero, or single-series PAYEMS model matches interaction model's Rank IC within noise.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST of more than 10% from its trailing 12-month peak signals weakening residential investment demand, a historically reliable leading indicator of broader economic slowdown, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST revised down from 1256k to 1181k, indicating downside momentum in late 2018
failure_condition: 60d forward SPX returns following HOUST drawdown triggers are positive in more than 55% of historical instances, or Rank IC drops below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a low and stable inflation regime (CPIAUCSL YoY below 2.5%), any near-term dovish signal in FEDFUNDS (no further hikes) is interpreted by markets as room for continued accommodation, producing an immediate positive S&P 500 reaction over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage 252.673 with FEDFUNDS held at 2.4% in Jan 2019, both consistent with low-inflation pause regime
failure_condition: 5d forward SPX returns during low-inflation pause periods do not exceed unconditional mean at p<0.10, or hypothesis reverses once CPIAUCSL YoY rises above 2.5% while relationship persists unchanged.
